name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.9756. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$5.0052 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$4.9756, stop A$4.7817, target A$5.3633. Risk/reward is 2.00:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
